title: Crizotinib in Patients with Tumors with MET Amplification or Exon 14 Deletion: Results from the NCI-MATCH ECOG-ACRIN Trial (EAY131) Subprotocols C1 and C2.
abstract: The NCI-MATCH trial enrolled patients to subprotocols C1 and C2 to evaluate the METtyrosine kinase inhibitor crizotinib for efficacy in patients with MET amplification (METamp; C1) or MET exon 14 skipping mutation (METex14; C2).
